name: @anansitrading/sage_registry
description: Private registry forked from open-gitagent/registry with gitagent source definitions and Claude/Codex parity enforcement

scripts.validate: npm run validate:upstream && npm run validate:private
scripts.build:site: cp index.json site/public/index.json && cd site && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:index && npm run build:site
